name: Black Cat Syndicate Limited
description: Black Cat Syndicate Limited is an Australian gold exploration and development company. The company's primary focus is on its high-grade gold projects in Western Australia, including the Kal East Gold Project, the Coyote Gold Operation, and the Paulsens Gold Operation. Black Cat Syndicate is actively working to explore, develop, and bring these projects into production, leveraging existing infrastructure and significant resource bases to create value for its shareholders.
